books.title: Strong Poison
books.author: Dorothy L. Sayers
books.summary: A gentleman detective works to exonerate a woman accused of poisoning her ex-lover.

books.title: The Three Musketeers
books.author: Alexandre Dumas
books.summary: A young Gascon moves to Paris to join the King’s Musketeers where he starts to investigate the kidnapping of his landlord’s wife.

books.title: The Autobiography of Ma-Ka-Tai-Me-She-Kia-Kiak, or Black Hawk
books.author: Black Hawk
books.summary: The autobiography of Black Hawk, the famous leader of the Native American Sauk tribe and central figure in the Black Hawk War of 1832.

books.title: Personal Recollections of Joan of Arc
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: A fictional biography of Joan of Arc from her early teenage years to her martyrdom.

books.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
books.author: Carlo Collodi
books.summary: A wooden puppet comes to life and goes on adventures.

books.title: You Never Can Tell
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: A family recently returned to England navigates a comedy of errors when they accidentally meet their estranged husband and unknown father.

books.title: Edward III
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: Edward III declares himself the true heir of France, which launches the Hundred Years’ War.

books.title: The Wonderful Visit
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: An angel falls into the everyday world of 19th Century England and is bewildered and despirited by human life and society.

books.title: The Old Man in the Corner
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: An elderly man explains to a woman reporter how he solved crimes that stumped the local police.

books.title: Dracula
books.author: Bram Stoker
books.summary: An ancient undead monster terrorizes Victorian London.

books.title: The House of the Dead
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.summary: A ex-convict in 19th-century Russia reminisces on his experiences in a Siberian prison.

books.title: The Murder of Roger Ackroyd
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A legendary Belgian detective comes out of retirement to investigate a friend’s murder.

books.title: The City of God
books.author: Augustine of Hippo
books.summary: Bishop Augustine of Hippo provides a defense of the Christian faith against its pagan critics, as well as explaining God’s work and purposes in world history, from beginning to end.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Errico Malatesta
books.summary: A collection of essays by Errico Malatesta.

books.title: The Book of Jade
books.author: David Park Barnitz
books.summary: A collection of decadent poetry by David Park Barnitz.

books.title: The Luck of Barry Lyndon
books.author: William Makepeace Thackeray
books.summary: A poor Irish rogue tries to win fame and fortune in the 18th-century English aristocracy.

books.title: The House on the Borderland
books.author: William Hope Hodgson
books.summary: An account of the terrifying metaphysical haunting of a recluse’s secluded home.

books.title: Call Mr. Fortune
books.author: H. C. Bailey
books.summary: A medically-qualified detective tackles mysteries ranging from a failed assassination to incidents at an all-girls school.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A collection of George MacDonald’s fairy tales, short stories, and novellas.

books.title: Through the Brazilian Wilderness
books.author: Theodore Roosevelt
books.summary: Theodore Roosevelt’s autobiographical account of his expedition into the uncharted depths of the Brazilian rainforest.
